## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] No `console.log` left in
- [ ] DS tokens used (no hardcoded hex)
- [ ] No 1px borders (use `box-shadow` or bg shifts)
- [ ] `'use client'` only on leaf components
- [ ] i18n strings added for any new copy (en + es)
